_comment: Cursor — Penpot MCP. Keep ONE server named 'penpot' (the installer manages an entry with that name — other names create duplicates it can't detect). REMOTE shown active: streamable-HTTP endpoint (use the url form, or the mcp-remote proxy if your client is stdio-only). For LOCAL (self-hosted), replace the entry with the one in '_local-alternative'. Replace YOUR_SECRET_MCP_KEY. Keep the Penpot plugin window open during a session.
